flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Long Beach City College fell 18% between 2007 and 2010 (21.2% → 17.4%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Long Beach City College rose 12% between 2007 and 2010 ($718 → $802).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Long Beach City College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Long Beach City College rose 84% between 2007 and 2010 (13.6k → 25.0k).
